name: Very Rich, Very Thin Chocolate Lace Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and chocolate in the top of a double boiler.
2. Combine with egg and remaining ingredients.
3. Drop by scant teaspoonfuls onto greased cookie sheets. The finished cookies will be 3 to 4 inches in diameter, so space them accordingly.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 325°F for about 12 minutes. Watch carefully to prevent burning.
5. Remove from the cookie sheet using a spatula. Press under the cookie with pressure against the sheet to remove easily without crumbling.
6. Place on racks to cool completely.
